units.content: system receives a coupling group that has been classified as divergent or under tension by the convergence analyzer
convergence analyzer has previously classified the coupling group as divergent or under tension
experimental-design generator enumerates a plurality of candidate measurement actions
each candidate measurement action is specified by a proposing automated actor's structured pointer set, a target entity identifier, a property identifier, and a predicted uncertainty
predicted uncertainty for each candidate measurement action is computed via the uncertainty-propagation layer
expected-information-gain value is derived from the reduction in posterior uncertainty over the coupling group's property value
reduction in posterior uncertainty would result if the candidate measurement action were performed and yielded a measurement record with the predicted uncertainty
generator emits a ranked list of candidate measurement actions sorted by expected-information-gain value
